info.description: Integrated team's elastic search wrapper and fuzzy search library into existing sites.

features.list: Cigna.com elastic search contains custom UI to support multiple data indexes (cigna.com & medical library)
Cigna Medical Group Arizona search tool modified to support 'fuzzy' searching when exact records are not found.
Developed a custom AWS Lambda integration and implemented with search wrapper to support private search indexing requirements for two internal sites.
Cigna UK, Cigna Global Health, Cigna Global, and two internal sites' elastic searches modified to preserve existing UI site requirements.

info.tools: HTML5, Sass, Bootstrap4, Next-Gen JavaScript, jQuery
